prompt: Create a vivid contemporary anime artbook cover/poster in a rebellious punk-goth street-art style, landscape 16:9 composition, dominated by hot pink, magenta, black, white, and orange. Center a glamorous original anime girl with very long two-tone twin-tail hair, platinum blonde with neon pink and orange streaks, wearing a black leather corset top, studded choker, padlock necklace, chains, straps, and a bright pink ribbon tie; her arms are raised across her face in a defiant X-like pose, wearing black lace fingerless gloves covered with rings, studs, tiny heart and star accessories, and long manicured nails. Her visible skin has a sleeve of colorful tattoo-style stickers including skulls, hearts, flowers, stars, crowns, the words RIOT and REBEL, and doodle graphics. Place a flat opaque dusty-rose square censor block over the center of her face, hiding facial details. The background is a dense punk collage wall with torn paper, graffiti, black ink splatter, skull stickers, crowns, large X marks, barcodes, tape scraps, and Japanese street-zine typography. Include exactly 6 prominent text elements: a huge white serif headline with black shadow reading ILLUSTRATION COLLECTION in the upper left, a smaller subtitle reading Original Character Art below it, Japanese text reading 反逆の美学 on the left, a black top-right label reading ARTBOOK // VOL. 01 // REBELLION // BEAUTY // CHAOS, Japanese graffiti reading "混沌" on the right, and vertical Japanese text reading "混沌の美" near the lower right edge. Add exactly 2 barcode stickers on the lower left, exactly 3 large black crown doodles, exactly 2 prominent skull graphics in the right-side collage, and multiple pink-and-black X graffiti marks. Use crisp clean anime line art, glossy highlights, high contrast, detailed accessories, layered screenprint texture, fashion-magazine cover energy, chaotic but balanced layout, sharp focus, professional illustration quality.
